Engine forces discarding an asset when playing a second Tool/Weapon asset ('slot capacity'): playing Flashlight discarded Magnifying Glass; playing Roland's .38 Special discarded Machete. In AHLCG an investigator may control multiple Weapon and multiple Tool assets at once (no such slot limit). This blocked a legal play.
